title: Layer V -- Inter-Unit Coordination
description: Build 5 governance skills for NEOS Layer V: cross-azpo-request, shared-resource-stewardship, federation-agreement, inter-unit-liaison, and polycentric-conflict-navigation. Grounded in Ostrom's polycentric governance with the millet system structural pattern (minus the Sultan) and Holochain agent-centric architecture as theoretical foundations.
